title: Attending a Party 参加派对
scene: Tom来到Mike家参加派对，和主人打招呼。

lines.en: Hi Mike! Happy birthday! This is for you.
lines.zh: 嗨Mike！生日快乐！这是给你的。

lines.en: Thank you, Tom! Come on in!
Wow, your house looks so nice. Are those balloons?
lines.zh: 哇，你家布置得好漂亮。那些是气球吗？

lines.en: Yes! My sister helped me decorate. Do you want some juice?
lines.zh: 对！我妹妹帮我布置的。你要喝果汁吗？

lines.en: Yes, please. Is everyone here already?
lines.zh: 好的，谢谢。大家都到了吗？

lines.en: Almost. Lucy and Jack are coming soon.
What games are we going to play?
We will play musical chairs and pin the tail on the donkey.
lines.zh: 我们要玩抢椅子和给驴贴尾巴。

lines.en: I love those games! This party is going to be fun.
lines.zh: 我喜欢那些游戏！这个派对一定很好玩。

lines.en: Thanks for coming, Tom. Let us enjoy the party!
lines.zh: 谢谢你来，Tom。我们好好玩吧！
